name: ZEUS ziltivekimab cardiovascular outcomes trial
summary: An active phase 3 cardiovascular outcomes trial testing monthly ziltivekimab in people with atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease, chronic kidney disease, and systemic inflammation.
population: People with atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease, chronic kidney disease, and hsCRP of at least 2 mg/L

trial_details.expected_results_window: The reviewed source layer includes a design and baseline-characteristics paper, not an outcome result.
trial_details.horizon_note: This is an active cardiovascular outcomes trial to watch, but baseline/design publication is not trial-result evidence.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Cytokine and Inflammasome Modulation because they can show whether the intervention changes health or disease-risk outcomes, safety, and biomarkers in People with atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease, chronic kidney disease, and hsCRP of at least 2 mg/L. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
